title: Soviet gulag collection, USSR paintings and tunes
description:
SOVIET GULAG COLLECTION. this pack changes the texture of some paintings to soviet posters from real life, pictures of USSR leaders and more.
As well as changes the "Blocks" music disk 
to the USSR national anthem.
body: Immerse your Minecraft world in a Soviet-themed aesthetic with the Soviet Gulag Collection resource pack. This themed pack replaces select in-game paintings with authentic-style Soviet posters and historical imagery, bringing a striking ideological flair to your builds. It also retextures the iconic “Blocks” music disc to play the USSR national anthem, adding a memorable audio twist to your gameplay.
